title: Geon Definition

title: Chaff and Flare

The answer should exclude unrelated uses of the words and focus on the military/technical context.

title: Nonconformity Definition
description: Define a nonconformity in earth science.
narrative: The user is looking for a precise geological definition of a nonconformity, a particular type of unconformity that separates igneous or metamorphic rocks from overlying sedimentary layers.  Relevance requires that the answer explain that it represents a substantial erosional hiatus, occurs at a contact between crystalline and stratified rocks, and is a hallmark of long-term erosion before sediment deposition.  The response should include the key distinguishing features, geological significance, and typical examples of nonconformities in the earth‑science context.
